highlights.text: I wrote at 4pm Wednesday: “My general lean is always to defer to the trend.
My general lean is we can work up to range resistance.
Above there, we can work to the higher targets in the bull case…..
The job today for bulls would be to defend that breakout and I wrote yesterday at 4pm: “My general is always just to defer to the trend though.
As readers know, I largely trade 1 setup: The Failed Breakdown.
Failed Breakdowns are the footprint of institutional accumulation.

The last three weeks all saw massive insitutional accumulation right off the Sunday futures open, and this week - like the two before it, saw us get long on Sunday evening, and stay long for a 100+ point move.
I’ll then do a deep dive into three major Failed Breakdowns we had this week.
Like last week, we had a Failed Breakdown at least once per day, but on several occasions twice.

post_title: Is SPX Ready To Make/Sustain All Time Highs? Feb 17th and 18th Plan
